ops.text: Phase 2 in flight. DONE: cc_steer/rendering.py (shared train/serve contract — CRITICAL redesign after real-data check: agent_action non-null in only 43/3969 traces and what_claude_did is judge-output ergo not live-computable, so model input = rendered before-turns only via context_turns/watcher_prompt/gate_text; user-steer trigger never leaks; truncated() rewinds w/o assistant requirement); store.py GATE_DDL (gate_sample + exemplar_embedding tables + methods); negatives.py (positive_window offsets 0..-5 from stored context, hard_negative from judge rejects, random_negative via cc-transcript sample_windows, idempotent by sample_key, sessions skip-once-sampled); exemplars.py (Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B via sentence-transformers 'embed' extra, digest-incremental build_index train-split only, brute-force cosine + MMR mmr_select, exemplars_for hydration); export gate+watcher configs (watcher completion = refined directions or NO_STEER); CLI sample-negatives + index; pipeline negatives stage. cc-steer wired to local cc-transcript via tool.uv.sources (REMOVE before publishing; needs cc-transcript 9.1 release + floor bump). cc-transcript sampling.py landed but being revised (candidates: any non-final anchored turn, fold trigger into before, trigger=None) — assistant-only turns are ~1% of real data. cc-steer-lab scaffolded separately: harness/{common,metrics,notes,data}.py, 71 tests green, ExperimentLog enforces cc-notes journaling (JournalError fails the run), frozen-eval machinery with sha256 manifest. Lab symlinked at cc-steer/lab (gitignored).
